recommendations.title: Wrong Cops
recommendations.overview: A group of bad cops look to dispose of a body that one of them accidentally shot.

recommendations.title: Yannick
recommendations.overview: In the middle of a performance of the play "Le Cocu", a bad boulevard comedy at a Parisian theatre, Yannick gets up and interrupts the show to take the evening back in hand.

recommendations.title: Reality
recommendations.overview: A wanna-be director is given 48 hours by a producer to find the best groan of pain, worthy of an Oscar, as the only condition to back his film.

recommendations.title: Deerskin
recommendations.overview: A man's obsession with owning the designer deerskin jacket of his dreams leads him to turn his back on his humdrum life in the suburbs, blow his life savings, and even turn him to crime.

recommendations.title: Rubber
recommendations.overview: In the California desert, the adventures of a telepathic killer-tire, mysteriously attracted by a very pretty girl, as witnessed by incredulous onlookers.

recommendations.title: Mandibles
recommendations.overview: When two simple-minded best friends find a giant fly trapped in the trunk of a stolen car, they decide to train it in hopes of striking it rich.

recommendations.title: Daaaaaalí!
recommendations.overview: A young French journalist repeatedly meets iconic surrealist artist Salvador Dalí for a documentary project that never came to be.

recommendations.title: Wrong
recommendations.overview: Dolph Springer wakes up one morning to realize he has lost the love of his life, his dog, Paul. During his quest to get Paul (and his life) back, Dolph radically changes the lives of others -- risking his sanity all the while.

recommendations.title: Incredible But True
recommendations.overview: Alain and Marie moved to the suburb house of their dreams. But the real estate agent warned them: what is in the basement may well change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: The Piano Accident
recommendations.overview: Social media sensation Magalie, known for posting shocking content, suffers a serious accident while filming one of her videos. She retreats to the mountains, accompanied by her assistant. Her peace is disrupted when a journalist begins blackmailing
